2605.10199.title: How Should LLMs Listen While Speaking? A Study of User-Stream Routing in Full-Duplex Spoken Dialogue
2605.10199.paper_summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue requires a model to keep listening while generating its own spoken response. This is challenging for large language models (LLMs), which are designed to extend a single coherent sequence and do not naturally support user input arriving during generation. We argue that how the user stream is routed into the LLM is therefore a key architectural question for full-duplex modeling. To study this question, we extend a text-only LLM into a unified full-duplex spoken dialogue system and compare two routing strategies under a shared training pipeline: (i) channel fusion, which injects the user stream directly into the LLM input, and (ii) cross-attention routing, which keeps the user stream as external memory accessed through cross-attention adapters. Experiments on spoken question answering and full-duplex interaction benchmarks reveal a clear tradeoff. Channel fusion yields stronger semantic grounding and consistently better question-answering performance. However, under semantically overlapping conditions such as user interruptions, it is more vulnerable to context corruption: if the model fails to stop in time, the overlapping user stream can interfere with ongoing generation and lead to semantically incoherent continuations. Cross-attention routing underperforms on question answering, but better preserves the LLM generation context and is more robust to this failure mode. These results establish user-stream routing as a central design axis in full-duplex spoken dialogue and offer practical guidance on the tradeoff between semantic integration and context robustness. We provide a demo page for qualitative inspection.
2605.10199.paper_summary_zh: 全雙工口語對話需要一個模型在生成自己的口語回應的同時持續聆聽。這對於大型語言模型（LLMs）來說是具有挑戰性的，因為它們被設計為延伸單一一致的序列，並不自然支持在生成過程中出現的用戶輸入。我們認為，如何將用戶流路由到LLM因此成為全雙工建模的一個關鍵架構問題。為了研究這個問題，我們將一個僅限文本的LLM擴展為一個統一的全雙工口語對話系統，並在共享的訓練管道下比較兩種路由策略：（i）通道融合，將用戶流直接注入LLM輸入；（ii）交叉注意路由，將用戶流保留為通過交叉注意適配器訪問的外部記憶。對口語問答和全雙工互動基準的實驗顯示出明顯的權衡。通道融合產生更強的語義基礎，並且在問答表現上持續更好。然而，在用戶干擾等語義重疊的條件下，它對上下文的破壞更為脆弱：如果模型未能及時停止，重疊的用戶流可能會干擾正在進行的生成並導致語義不連貫的延續。交叉注意路由在問答上表現不佳，但更好地保留了LLM生成的上下文，並對這種失敗模式更具魯棒性。這些結果確立了用戶流路由作為全雙工口語對話中的一個核心設計軸，並提供了在語義整合和上下文魯棒性之間的權衡的實用指導。我們提供了一個演示頁面以供質量檢查。
2605.10199.author: Hui Lu et.al.
2605.10199.authors: Hui Lu, Xueyuan Chen, Huimeng Wang, Shuhai Peng, Shiyin Kang, Xixin Wu, Zhiyong Wu
